title: Fig. 5 in A New Marine Cyrtophorid Ciliate, Dysteria nabia nov. spec. (Ciliophora: Phyllopharyngea: Cyrtophorida: Dysteriidae), from South Korea
author: Park, Mi Hyun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 5. Maximum likelihood tree based on SSU RNA gene sequences, showing the position of Dysteria nabia nov. spec (bold font). Numbers at the nodes represent the Bayesian posterior probability value and the bootstrap values from maximum likelihood. Solid circles represent full support in both algorithms.
steps_raw: Fig. 5. Maximum likelihood tree based on SSU RNA gene sequences, showing the position of Dysteria nabia nov. spec (bold font). Numbers at the nodes represent the Bayesian posterior probability value and the bootstrap values from maximum likelihood. Solid circles represent full support in both algorithms.
